topic.title: Office Hours Update for the week (Feb 2nd - Feb 6th)
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Since this week’s assignment is more technical than usual and may require additional support, I’m temporarily adjusting my office hours to better accommodate questions.

Instead of the regular Monday and Friday 2–4 PM sessions, I will hold office hours on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday, 11:00 AM – 12:00 PM EST for this week.

If you have questions about the assignment, please try to attend one of these sessions so we can work through issues together in real time. This will be more efficient than handling individual Teams messages and will help ensure everyone gets the same clarifications.

Regular office hours will resume next week.

 

Best,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
